calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Vacate Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp Sections 473(B) And 473(D).
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: CLAIMANT LARGO CONCRETE INC./THE HARTFORD's Motion For Reconsideration Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Vacate Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp Sections 473(B) And 473(D).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Largo Concrete's Motion for Reconsideration and to Vacate Dismissal is DENIED. As a nonparty, Largo Concrete may not seek these remedies. (See word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CLAIMANT LARGO CONCRETE INC./THE HARTFORD'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CCP SECTIONS 473(B) AND 473(D). (TENTATIVE RULING PART 2 OF 2)
Off Calendar Sep-11-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Vacate Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp Sections 473(B) And 473(D).
Off Calendar Sep-11-2025 Continued To Sep-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Isai Lerin Carrera, Esq. of Arns Davis Law (tel: 415-495-7800) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. Carlos Americano, Esq. of England Ponticello & St. Clair (tel: 619-255-6450) for Lien Claimant Largo Concrete Inc. / The Hartford.
Atty. Elizabeth Munoz, Esq. of Lorber, Greenfield & Polito, LLP (tel: 858-513-1020) for Defendant Suffolk Construction Company, Inc.

Hearing Re: CLAIMANT LARGO CONCRETE INC./THE HARTFORD's Motion For Reconsideration Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Vacate Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp Sections 473(B) And 473(D).

Matter discussed. Counsel Carlos Americano states he was not served with the opposition and requests a continuance to file a reply brief. The Court grants the request. The Court continues the matter for further hearing to September 29, 2025, at 9:00 A.M. in department 301. The reply brief deadline will follow from the new hearing date.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Victoria Sanchez, CSR# 13447 (tel: 559-308-2237 / email: sanchez_victoria@rocketmail.com) =(301/CVA)
